query:
SELECT
                    YEAR(MIN(`c`.`publish_date`)) AS `year`,
                    `i`.`id`,
                    `i`.`name`
                FROM `Occurrence` `o`
                JOIN `Comic` `c` ON `o`.`comic_id` = `c`.`id`
                JOIN `Item` `i` ON `o`.`item_id` = `i`.`id`
                WHERE `i`.`type` = 'cast' AND `c`.`publish_date` IS NOT NULL
                GROUP BY `i`.`id`
                ORDER BY `year`, `i`.`name`
